ValidationRule.description: We can only allow users to change owners to the same OBC tag. GCE team can adjust to other company if needed. TBD/Blank need to be done by GCE
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_INTERACTION_008: The new Queue does not have the same tag as the Interaction. As needed, please pick a different queue or user, or ask GCE to perform special owner transfers
